description.id: Hampers eksklusif untuk klien dan mitra bisnis. Termasuk bamboo tumbler, organiser kulit, dan camilan organik.
description.en: Exclusive hampers for clients and business partners. Includes bamboo tumbler, leather organizer, and organic snacks.

description.id: Tumbler bamboo dengan rangkaian bunga kering yang cantik. Hadiah sempurna untuk orang tersayang.
description.en: Bamboo tumbler with beautiful dried flower arrangement. The perfect gift for your loved ones.

description.id: Hampers pernikahan dengan kemasan zero waste. Ceramic mug, sabun organik, dan succulent cantik.
description.en: Wedding hampers with zero waste packaging. Ceramic mug, organic soap, and beautiful succulent.

description.id: Set hadiah dengan logo perusahaan Anda. Tumbler, sedotan bamboo, dan teh organik dalam pouch kraft.
description.en: Gift set with your company logo. Tumbler, bamboo straw, and organic tea in kraft pouch.
